description: Baseline: machina_roles 2A1M scripted - StarterCogPolicyImpl miner never deposits
v3: BalancedMinerPolicyImpl element-aware mining with 30-step near-hub search + mine_until_full fallback. Deposits C+Ge+O but Si unreachable (avg over seeds 0 1 2)
v4: Approach-cell hub deposit fix + full-map exploration. Si now found but O in enemy territory causes 1 death (avg 0.66/0.57/0.58)
v5: Unreachable extractor tracking prevents death loop to O@(-31,10). Fallback to mine_until_full when all known extractors unreachable (avg 0.65/0.64/0.58)
v6: Safe near-hub search (40 steps) after all extractors of type unreachable. Improves O recovery after enemy-territory mark. avg 0.601/0.647/0.704 seeds 0/1/2
v7: Fix aligner hub navigation with avoid_hazards=True for _get_heart. Prevents stuck loops at hub. Aligner[0] max_steps_without_motion 714->1. avg 0.609/0.647/0.704 seeds 0/1/2
v8: SharedMap per-element extractor tracking for persistence across miner deaths. No measurable improvement for seeds 0-2 (same 0.609/0.647/0.704)
v9: Per-element search timeout (Si/Ge get 160 steps vs C/O at 80). Same result - Si bottleneck is death not search time
v10: Focused single-element trips (7C then 7O then 7Ge then 7Si). Worse for seeds with hub needing all 4 elements simultaneously (miner completes fewer full cycles)
v11: Heart timeout+patrol+junction-move-block fix+periodic blocked_cells reset. Seeds 0-2 unchanged. Seed 6 improved 0.469->0.501. Stuck aligners partially fixed
v12: Patrol hub-return pulse every 40 steps. Fixed permanent patrol bug: aligner now periodically re-checks hub for newly-crafted hearts, enabling resumed alignment. avg 0.661/0.646/0.704
v13: Faster hub-patrol cycle (25/20). avg 0.667. Reverted.
v14: Faster move_blocked reset 30 steps. Catastrophic. Reverted.
v15: Clear unreachable_extractors. No change. Reverted.
v16: Nearby enemy junction priority. No change. Reverted.
v17: Junction blacklisting. No change. Reverted.
v18: Defend friendly junctions when heartless (noop on junction to block recapture). Tiny improvement seed0. avg 0.671.
v19: Add scout support - 2A+1Scout (no miner). Seed0/1 catastrophic (no miner means no heart supply). 4-cog variant also worse. Reverted.
v20: Aligner junction claim coordination via SharedMap. Aligners now target different junctions. Seed1 +8.6% but seed2 -2.9%. Net avg 0.682 (+1.6% vs v18).
v21: Proximity-aware claims (only honor claim when claimer within 20 cells of target). Seed2 recovered to 0.704, seed0 improved. avg 0.691 (+3.0% vs v18).
